category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a crossassembler package; official README describes WLA DX as a multi-platform cross assembler package.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wla-dx; official GitHub README expands it as WLA DX and Wzonka-Lad Assembler Deluxe.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links Read the Docs; Read the Docs hosts WLA DX documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/vhelin/wla-dx, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a crossassembler package; source_facts.executables lists multiple wla-* assembler binaries and wlalink.
